case_title: IGOR GRUBAC VS. EMPIRE COURT APARTMENTS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TYLER KRAMER, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT EMPIRE COURT APARTMENTS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF IGOR GRUBAC IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT EMPIRE COURT APARTMENTS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMMA CASTRO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RENEE ORTIZ (HER DAUGHTER)WHICH WAS ALLOWED AT THE LAST HEARING. DEFENDANT PAID THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AMOUNT TO THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-09-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IGOR GRUBAC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMPIRE COURT APARTMENTS, REPRESENTED BY TYLER KRAMER, PROPERTY MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S DAUGHTER, RENE ORTIZ, TESTIFIES TO THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT EMMA CASTRO IS DECEASED. COURT DETERMINES THAT TYLER KRAMER IS THE PARTY MOST FAMILIAR WITH THE MATTER AND HAS HAD THE MOST INTERATCTION WITH PLAINTIFF AND TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANTS. PARTIES AGREE TO SETTLEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $399.00. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED TO AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
